description: Final polish module to maximize discoverability and page speed via complete metadata, structured data, OG image, font/image optimization, sitemap, robots.txt, and Lighthouse score targets.

userStories.title: Configure complete metadata in layout
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive metadata on every page so search engines and social platforms correctly index and display the site.
acceptanceCriteria: `app/[locale]/layout.tsx` exports `generateMetadata` function accepting `{ params: { locale: string } }`
`description` set in the correct language (60–160 chars)
Each sub-page's `page.tsx` exports a `metadata` object with a page-specific `title`

userStories.title: Add Schema.org structured data
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a JSON-LD `Person` schema so search engines understand who this site is about.
acceptanceCriteria: `app/components/PersonSchema.tsx` exists as a server component with a default export
Renders a `<script type="application/ld+json">` tag with correct JSON-LD

Schema includes: `@type: Person`, `name: Shunyu Yao`, `alternateName: 姚顺宇`, `url`, `jobTitle`, `worksFor.name: Chuangyi Technology`, `alumniOf` array (SJTU, XJTU), `email: ysy2017@sjtu.edu.cn`, `sameAs` array (onestory.art, github.com/ShunyuYao)

userStories.title: Create static OG image
userStories.description: As a user sharing the site on WeChat or Twitter, I want a branded preview image to appear so the link looks professional.
acceptanceCriteria: A static OG image exists at `public/og/default.png` (1200×630px)
Image shows: name "Shunyu Yao · 姚顺宇", tagline "AIGC Researcher & Product Builder", site URL `shunyuyao.github.io`, dark background
Image can be created manually (e.g. using Figma or a design tool) and committed as a static asset
`twitter.images` also points to the OG image

userStories.title: Optimize fonts
userStories.description: As a user on a slow connection, I want the page to load quickly even with custom fonts loaded.
acceptanceCriteria: Inter font is loaded via `next/font/google` in `app/layout.tsx` (outside `[locale]`) with `subsets: ['latin']`, `display: 'swap'`, weights `['400', '500', '600', '700']`
`Ma Shan Zheng` (calligraphy font for 姚顺宇 subtitle) is loaded with Google Fonts `preconnect` + stylesheet link, `display=swap`
NO full Noto Sans SC loaded globally — use system font fallback for Chinese body text: `"PingFang SC", "Noto Sans CJK SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif`
CSS `font-family` stack in `globals.css` or Tailwind config is: `Inter → -apple-system → PingFang SC → Noto Sans CJK SC → Microsoft YaHei → sans-serif`

userStories.title: Optimize images
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all images to use `next/image` so they are automatically converted to WebP and lazy-loaded.
acceptanceCriteria: All `` tags in the codebase replaced with `next/image` `` component
Avatar image on `/about` page uses `priority` prop (above the fold)
All logo images in Work section use appropriate `width` and `height` props
`public/images/` directory has a `.gitkeep` or at least a placeholder avatar if no real photo yet

userStories.title: Generate sitemap.xml
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a `sitemap.xml` so search engines can discover all pages in both languages.
acceptanceCriteria: `app/sitemap.ts` exists and exports a default function returning a `MetadataRoute.Sitemap` array
Covers all pages: `''`, `/now`, `/work`, `/papers`, `/press`, `/awards`, `/about`, `/archive` for both `zh` and `en` locales
`npm run build` generates `out/sitemap.xml` (verify file exists in build output)

userStories.title: Add robots.txt
userStories.description: As a developer, I need `robots.txt` to allow full crawling and reference the sitemap.

userStories.title: Run Lighthouse and fix top issues
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify performance and SEO scores meet targets and fix any blocking issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Run Lighthouse on the production build (serve `out/` with `npx serve out` and run Lighthouse in Chrome DevTools)
All interactive elements have accessible labels
Fix any issues found until scores meet targets
